ddls:
CREATE TABLE "trucks" (
  "truck_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each truck */,
  "fm_id" INTEGER /* FM ID of the truck */,
  "primary_fleet_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the primary fleet the truck belongs to */,
  "fleet_tonnage_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the fleet tonnage of the truck */,
  "function_code_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the function code of the truck */,
  "blackout_status" TEXT /* Blackout status of the truck (e.g., Yes, No) */,
  "make" TEXT /* The make of the truck */,
  "model" TEXT /* The model of the truck */,
  "year" INTEGER /* The year the truck was manufactured */,
  "license_plate" TEXT /* The license plate number of the truck */,
  "vin" TEXT /* The Vehicle Identification Number (VIN) of the truck */,
  "last_maintenance_date" TEXT /* The date of the last maintenance check */,
  "driver_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the driver assigned to the truck */,
  "status" TEXT /* The current status of the truck (e.g., active, inactive, in maintenance) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("truck_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trucks_fleet_tonnage_id FOREIGN KEY ("fleet_tonnage_id") REFERENCES fleet_tonnages ("fleet_tonnage_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trucks_driver_id FOREIGN KEY ("driver_id") REFERENCES drivers ("driver_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trucks_function_code_id FOREIGN KEY ("function_code_id") REFERENCES function_codes ("function_code_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trucks_primary_fleet_id FOREIGN KEY ("primary_fleet_id") REFERENCES primary_fleets ("primary_fleet_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "primary_fleets" (
  "primary_fleet_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each primary fleet */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the primary fleet */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the primary fleet */,
  "location" TEXT /* The base location of the primary fleet */,
  "manager_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the manager responsible for the fleet */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("primary_fleet_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_primary_fleets_manager_id FOREIGN KEY ("manager_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "fleet_tonnages" (
  "fleet_tonnage_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each fleet tonnage */,
  "tonnage" REAL /* Tonnage of the fleet */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the fleet tonnage */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("fleet_tonnage_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "function_codes" (
  "function_code_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each function code */,
  "code" INTEGER /* Code of the function */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the function code */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("function_code_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "income" (
  "income_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each income entry */,
  "truck_id" INTEGER /* ID of the truck that generated the income */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date the income was generated */,
  "amount" REAL /* Amount of income generated */,
  "source" TEXT /* The source of the income (e.g., client name, project) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("income_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_income_truck_id FOREIGN KEY ("truck_id") REFERENCES trucks ("truck_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "contributions" (
  "contribution_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each contribution entry */,
  "truck_id" INTEGER /* ID of the truck that made the contribution */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date the contribution was made */,
  "amount" REAL /* Amount of contribution made */,
  "source" TEXT /* The source of the contribution (e.g., client name, project) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("contribution_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_contributions_truck_id FOREIGN KEY ("truck_id") REFERENCES trucks ("truck_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "kms" (
  "km_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each km entry */,
  "truck_id" INTEGER /* ID of the truck that traveled the distance */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date the distance was traveled */,
  "distance" REAL /* Distance traveled in kilometers */,
  "start_location" TEXT /* The starting location of the trip */,
  "end_location" TEXT /* The ending location of the trip */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("km_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_kms_truck_id FOREIGN KEY ("truck_id") REFERENCES trucks ("truck_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "drivers" (
  "driver_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each driver */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the driver */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the driver */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the driver */,
  "address" TEXT /* The home address of the driver */,
  "license_number" TEXT /* The driver's license number */,
  "hire_date" TEXT /* The date the driver was hired */,
  "status" TEXT /* The current status of the driver (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("driver_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., manager, driver, maintenance) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* The hashed password for the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* The date and time of the last login */,
  "last_activity" TEXT /* The date and time of the last activity */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* JSON object containing user permissions */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the system */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the system was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., login, logout) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* The IP address from which the user accessed the system */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* The user agent string of the device used to access the system */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
